name: Multi-use Drying Rack - Brightroom™
description:
Take good care of your garments with this Multi-Use Drying Rack from Brightroom™. Made from plastic and metal, this efficient rack holds up to 26 pounds and offers 76.01 square feet of drying space. Its versatile uses include air-drying delicates as well as storing and organizing them.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
